title: Skills plus MCP Integration and 2026 Evolution · Threat Case: Cross Client Evals
summary: Ship a skill-driven MCP workflow across Codex and Claude with migration controls. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext cross client evals increment in a production skill and MCP integration package. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Run trigger, tool selection, permission, error, and outcome evals in both clients.
Declare skill tool dependencies and provide actionable setup and fallback behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
